nothingToShow_token: You don't have any token yet
nothingToShow_tx: You don't have any transaction yet
nothingToShow_nft: You don't have any NFT yet
connectSnapSubtitle: If you don't have Post Fiat installed you will be prompted to install it.
snapAnswer: Snaps extend the capabilities of MetaMask by adding new functionality. This Snap lets MetaMask manage PFTL accounts and keys.
accountInfoCallout: This account was generated with your MetaMask Secret Recovery Phrase.
installMetaMaskExtensionDescription: If you don't have the MetaMask extension installed, click the button below to visit the official page and install it.
installMetaMaskExtensionExplanation: MetaMask is a crypto wallet and gateway to blockchain apps. It allows you to manage your keys, access decentralized applications, and connect to various blockchains.
sendCallout: Please only enter a valid PFTL address. Sending funds to a different network might result in permanent loss.
transferCompletedText: Your transfer was successful. You can view it on the explorer. It might take a few seconds to appear in your transaction history.
transferFailedText: Your transfer failed. Please wait some time and try again. Before trying again, make sure that your previous transaction was not successful.
transferFailedText_MetaMask: Error signing the transaction with MetaMask. You can safely try again.
goToYourMetaMaskToSignTheTx: Go to your MetaMask to sign the transaction
balanceInfoExplanation: PFTL accounts require a minimum reserve of {{baseReserveCostInXrp}} PFT to prevent spam and cover the computational costs of maintaining the network, ensuring account integrity and discouraging frivolous account creation. For each OwnerCount, an additional {{ownerReserveCostInXrpPerItem}} PFT is required.
balanceInfoExplanation2: The reserve can only be recovered by deleting the account from PFTL.
reviewTxSubtitle: Before confirming your transaction, please double-check all the information listed. Once the transaction is signed and broadcasted, it cannot be undone. Ensuring accuracy now can prevent potential issues later.
accountNotActiveTitle: One more step... activate your account.
accountNotActiveText: You need to activate your account before using the wallet. Deposit at least {{baseReserveCostInXrp}} PFT in your wallet and the wallet will become fully operational.
activateAccountAlertText: On PFTL, a minimum of {{baseReserveCostInXrp}} PFT must be sent to a new account to activate it. This requirement is primarily for security and efficiency reasons.
activateAccountText: You can activate it right now by sending at least
activateAccountText2: to your address, which you can obtain by copying it below or by scanning the QR code.
inviteToBuyText: You can use the on-ramp to fund the reserve on supported mainnet assets.
inviteToGoToFaucetText: You can fund this account from the faucet.
snapOnlyAvailableInDesktop: We are sorry. Post Fiat is only available on desktop
snapOnlyAvailableInDesktopText: You can access all the functionality of Post Fiat from your desktop
trustLineCallout: Please verify the token details carefully before adding a trust line. Adding a trust line allows you to hold tokens issued by this address.
